name: Eggs Poached in Broth
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat broth (1-1/2 to 2 inches) to boiling; reduce to simmering.
2 Break each egg into custard cup or saucer.
3 Hold cup or saucer close to broth's surface and slip egg into broth.
4 Cook about 5 minutes, or until whites are set and yolks thickened.
5 Remove eggs with slotted spoon.
1 SERVING; 80 CALORIES PER EGG.
